## Notifications Secret

The CronJob reads the webhook URL from a Kubernetes Secret. Create this secret yourself
(e.g. via SealedSecret, `kubectl create secret`, or your preferred tool):

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.### Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet. ## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.d## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.t## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet. ## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.e## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.`## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.s## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.l## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet./## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.w## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.i## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.o## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.b## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.a## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.l## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.d## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.`## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.o## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet.e## Notifications Secret

| Secret Name | Key | Value |
|-------------|-----|-------|
| `instagram-monitor-secrets` | `NOTIFICATION_URL` | Your webhook URL |

The secret ref is marked `optional: true` â€” the monitor runs and logs alerts if the secret doesn't exist yet. ## Notifications Secret
